Product Name: Baseus 0.3mm Full-glass Crystal Anti-fingerprint Tempered Glass Film for Tesla model 3 / Y 15-inch
Features:
Baseus Crystal tempered glass for Tesla 3/Y
Make your Tesla stay intact. Baseus Crystal tempered glass, which is distinguished by a thickness of 0.3 mm and a diagonal of 15" and will protect your car's touchscreen, will help you. The glass was designed with the Tesla 3/Y in mind, so it adheres perfectly to the screen, provides fast touch response and is fingerprint resistant. It also guarantees excellent 8K visibility, is non-reflective and highly scratch-resistant.
Solid performance
Baseus Crystal tempered glass consists of five layers that prevent scratching and damage with high efficiency. Baseus Crystal is extremely resistant, while at the same time, thanks to its thickness of 0.3 mm, it allows you to maintain instant response to touch. The use of anti-reflective coating makes the screen non-reflective and provides excellent visibility both on a sunny day and a dark night.
Easy installation
Installing the Baseus Crystal tempered glass takes seconds and is trivial. All you need to do is use an alcohol-based wipe to remove stains and degrease the screen surface. Then wipe the screen with a dry cloth and use the sticker to remove dust. Sticking the glass will help you with a special tool that will allow you to fit it perfectly to the screen. All necessary accessories are included in the kit.
Package Included: Tempered Glass x 1, Dust-proof installation tool x 1, Cleaning kit x 1

How to correctly start the car with a jump starter?
3 steps:
Connect. Insert smart ignition clamps into the EC5 interface of the starter -- flashing red and green lights inform you about the connection status.
Clamp. Raise your car hood. Connect wires -- positive (red) with battery terminal marked with plus and negative (black) on negative pole in the battery.
Start the car. Go back to the vehicle and start it. Before you start driving, remove the starter from the car battery.

Product Name: Baseus SharpTool Series Emergency Hammer Pro-Cluster
Features:
Versatile and convenient design: This device can be used to break glass, use a flashlight or cut seat belts in an emergency. Compact and convenient design, easy to carry when traveling.
High precision: The cutting blade is made of stainless steel and carefully sharpened to ensure high precision.
Solid material: The casing is made of aluminum alloy, very sturdy and durable.
Easy to use: This device is very easy to use, users just need to place the blade on the glass and press firmly to break the glass. For cutting seat belts, users just need to place the wire on the cutting blade and pull to cut the wire.
Package Included: 1 x Emergency Hammer Pro, 1 x USB-C cable
description:
Baseus SharpTool Series Emergency Hammer Pro is a multi-purpose safety equipment product that helps users confidently deal with emergency situations. It is a useful tool for those using road vehicles or in extreme sports activities.

This tool has three main functions:

1. Escape hammer: Baseus SharpTool Series Emergency Hammer Pro has a powerful hammer head made from high-quality materials, helping to break glass or car windows in an emergency situation. When necessary, you can use this hammer head to create a strong impact on the glass door and escape from the car.
2. Safety cutter: The product also comes with an integrated safety cutter blade. This blade can be used to cut seat belts or straps if you are trapped in a vehicle or in another emergency situation. The blade is designed safely, helping you cut quickly and effectively without endangering yourself.
3. Signal light: With 4 lighting modes, it helps you easily operate in the dark, signal for help and ward off natural dangers.
